The sniper_real_fills_grinder output indicates that 5 keepers were found, with the top keeper having a wide_pnl of -90.8, edge_capture of -126.0, and a win rate of 0.5. The mechanism behind this candidate involves analyzing the output of the sniper_real_fills_grinder, which is a parameter sweep of the SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK real-fills validation process. The grinder output provides information on the top keepers, including their wide_pnl, edge_capture, and win rate.
